name: yahoo-fantasy-baseball-mcp
description: Bring-your-own-credentials local MCP server for managing a Yahoo Fantasy Baseball team via Claude.
author: dingyiyi0226

scripts.pack:safe: npm run pack && MCPB=yahoo-fantasy-baseball-v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version").mcpb && TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d) && unzip -q "$MCPB" -d "$TMPDIR" && rm "$MCPB" && (cd "$TMPDIR" && zip -0 -r - .) > "$MCPB" && rm -rf "$TMPDIR"
scripts.version: node scripts/sync-version.js && git add manifest.json src/server.ts
